headline: Northside Kings: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Northside Kings carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 61.44, led by Bhayshul Tuten, Mike Evans, and RJ Harvey. The clearest lineup pressure point is the QB slot held by Jordan Love at 52.4 C-AVI.

recent_trades.summary: On July 15, Northside Kings traded with Ravens Regime and acquired RJ Harvey, Bhayshul Tuten, 2026 Round 2 (original roster 2) while sending Tyler Warren. RJ Harvey is now the verified RB starter at 62.3 C-AVI and 75.2 D-AVI; Bhayshul Tuten is now the verified RB starter at 72.9 C-AVI and 78.7 D-AVI. It added 1 draft asset to the franchise's asset base at the time of the deal.

On June 30, Northside Kings traded with Conquistadors, Crimson Tide Pods and acquired Malik Washington, Mike Evans, 2028 Round 2 (original roster 1) while sending Matthew Golden, 2027 Round 2 (original roster 5). Malik Washington is now on the current roster at 42.0 C-AVI and 56.4 D-AVI; Mike Evans is now the verified WR starter at 70.8 C-AVI and 75.2 D-AVI. The transaction moved out 1 draft asset, which reduces the franchise's remaining draft flexibility relative to keeping those picks. It added 1 draft asset to the franchise's asset base at the time of the deal.

On April 24, Northside Kings traded with Conquistadors and acquired Xavier Worthy, 2027 Round 1 (original roster 1), 2027 Round 3 (original roster 1) while sending 2027 Round 1 (original roster 4), 2027 Round 1 (original roster 5). Xavier Worthy is now the verified FLEX starter at 58.1 C-AVI and 71.0 D-AVI. The transaction moved out 2 draft assets, which reduces the franchise's remaining draft flexibility relative to keeping those picks. It added 2 draft assets to the franchise's asset base at the time of the deal.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Bhayshul Tuten (72.9), Mike Evans (70.8), and RJ Harvey (62.3).

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Jordan Love is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 52.4. Any acquisition should clear that lineup threshold.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 15 offensive players, with 7 outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 63.52.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 15 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
